attacking_style: Not primarily an attacking rider in traditional sense; excels in time trials where sustained power over 30+ km distance is key to success.
team_tactics: Strategic recovery management: deliberately rode conservatively in road stages to preserve optimal TT form, suggesting team prioritizes stage-specific performance over GC positioning.
terrain_preference: Long time trials (32km+) where sustained power and pacing discipline matter most. Road stage terrain appears secondary to TT preparation.
vulnerability: Limited data on climbing or bunch racing; conservative stage racing approach suggests potential weakness in sustained GC campaigns requiring consistent daily effort.
key_patterns: Exceptional TT performance: defeated Van Aert by 2 seconds over 32km at Dauphine
53-second margin over benchmark indicates world-class time trialing ability
Strategic energy management: intentionally reduced road stage effort to optimize TT form
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated elite TT form with stage win and massive benchmark gap at Dauphine 2022
